subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Revelation hath proclaimed: He is, verily, the One God besides Whom there is none other, the Single, the Chosen One. Erelong shall the banners of victory be raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق لسان الوحی انه لا اله الا هو الواحد المختار سوف یرتفع اعلام النصر و
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
